Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. A new C++ back end for ocamlc 182 upvotes, 15 comments
  2. Fast and Gorgeous Erosion Filter 160 upvotes, 15 comments
  3. Reverse Engineering Crazy Taxi, Part 2 40 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. Show HN: Git bayesect – Bayesian Git bisection for non-deterministic bugs 277 upvotes, 41 comments
  5. Weather.com/Retro 196 upvotes, 33 comments
  6. What Gödel Discovered (2020) 54 upvotes, 7 comments
  7. The revenge of the data scientist 142 upvotes, 28 comments
  8. Email obfuscation: What works in 2026? 128 upvotes, 30 comments
  9. Show HN: NASA Artemis II Mission Timeline Tracker 53 upvotes, 11 comments
  10. New laws to make it easier to cancel subscriptions and get refunds 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  11. Bringing Clojure programming to Enterprise (2021) 34 upvotes, 6 comments
  12. Quantum computing bombshells that are not April Fools 173 upvotes, 58 comments
  13. IBM Announces Strategic Collaboration with Arm 36 upvotes, 8 comments
  14. Steam on Linux Use Skyrocketed Above 5% in March 372 upvotes, 166 comments
  15. Mercor says it was hit by cyberattack tied to compromise LiteLLM 40 upvotes, 13 comments
  16. Signing data structures the wrong way 104 upvotes, 45 comments
  17. StepFun 3.5 Flash is #1 cost-effective model for OpenClaw tasks (300 battles) 158 upvotes, 74 comments
  18. AI for American-produced cement and concrete 194 upvotes, 113 comments
  19. Gone (Almost) Phishin' 17 upvotes, 5 comments
  20. Trinity Large Thinking 35 upvotes, 15 comments
  21. EmDash – A spiritual successor to WordPress that solves plugin security 569 upvotes, 414 comments
  22. Subscription bombing and how to mitigate it 148 upvotes, 106 comments
  23. Built a cheap DIY fan controller because my motherboard never had working PWM 16 upvotes, 6 comments
  24. Live: Artemis II Launch Day Updates 921 upvotes, 788 comments
  25. DRAM pricing is killing the hobbyist SBC market 474 upvotes, 399 comments
  26. Ask HN: Who is hiring? (April 2026) 240 upvotes, 206 comments
  27. Show HN: Dull – Instagram Without Reels, YouTube Without Shorts (iOS) 85 upvotes, 69 comments
  28. AI Perfected Chess. Humans Made It Unpredictable Again 39 upvotes, 33 comments
  29. SpaceX files to go public 312 upvotes, 420 comments
  30. Telli (YC F24) is hiring engineers, designers, and more [on-site, Berlin] 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 6:00pm, 2 April 2026. Source here.
